notes: Shanghai isolate series; MRBP reported as increasing from 36.4% in 2016 to 97.2% in 2022.
Shanghai isolate series; regional high-resistance anchor before the 2024 multicenter outbreak study.
Five sentinel hospitals in China during 2024; 393/394 isolates displayed high-level azithromycin resistance.
Nationwide Australian tNGS study of 2024-positive respiratory specimens estimated macrolide resistance at 8/188 (4%).
Health New Zealand notes MRBP has been detected by PHF Science and is being assessed; no national fraction located, so use a low detected/imported anchor pending surveillance.
No current public national fraction located; CDC notes global reports including Europe, so use a low/imported anchor pending local surveillance.
No current public national fraction located; CDC notes global reports including Europe, so use a low/imported anchor pending local surveillance.
PAHO reports antibiotic-resistant pertussis cases detected since 2024 in Brazil, Mexico, Peru, and the United States; fraction is a low/sporadic modeling anchor.
CDC states reported MRBP infections remain rare in the United States; keep a low/sporadic modeling anchor.
Kobe 2025 report found MT27-MRBP related to China lineages; other 2025 local reports describe MRBP clusters, but this is not a national prevalence estimate.
No country-specific public fraction located; use a low/imported anchor rather than extrapolating high-resistance settings elsewhere in Asia.
